title: mentha × nemorosa var. velutina
intro: Mentha × nemorosa var. velutina, also known as woolly mint, is a variety of hybrid mint that is a cross between Mentha nemorosa and Mentha aquatica, characterized by its soft, velvety leaves and stems. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of woolly mint include relief from nausea, bloating, and indigestion, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Woolly mint can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile ingredient in natural remedies and culinary applications.
